Common.tagline: ID photos, done right in your browser

Home.heroTitle: ID photos, done right in your browser
Home.heroSubtitle: Upload a portrait, then cut out, swap the background, crop to spec, lay out for printing, compress, and export — all without ever uploading your photo.
Home.ctaHint: Free · No sign-up · 100% in your browser

privacy.title: Privacy first
privacy.desc: Every step runs on your device. Your photos never leave the browser.

smart.title: Smart crop
smart.desc: Faces and shoulders are auto-aligned to each country's spec.

layout.title: One-click layout
layout.desc: Auto-tile onto 4x6 or 5x7 paper with crop marks ready for the print shop.

compress.title: Precise compression
compress.desc: Binary-search compression to hit the exact KB range visa portals require.

uploadDropzone.title: Drop a photo here, or click to choose
uploadDropzone.subtitle: JPG / PNG / HEIC · up to 50 MB

Footer.tagline: ID photo studio inside your browser

Studio.title: Studio
Studio.subtitle: Upload a portrait to cut out, recolor the background, crop, and lay out.

empty.title: No photo yet
empty.subtitle: Upload a portrait to get started

Crop.title: Photo spec
Crop.subtitle: Pick a spec to lock the aspect ratio and auto-center the head.

detect.failed: Face detection failed — drag the frame manually.
detect.noFace: No face detected — falling back to a centred crop.

warnings.title: Composition hints
warnings.head-too-small: Head is small: currently {ratio}% — spec asks for ~{lo}%–{hi}%
warnings.head-too-large: Head is large: currently {ratio}% — spec asks for ~{lo}%–{hi}%
warnings.eye-too-high: Eyes too high: currently {ratio}% from top — spec asks for ~{lo}%–{hi}%
warnings.eye-too-low: Eyes too low: currently {ratio}% from top — spec asks for ~{lo}%–{hi}%
warnings.face-not-found: No face detected — can't check composition.

Background.title: Background color
Background.compareHint: Drag the divider to compare backgrounds

Export.title: Export
Export.subtitle: Download the current photo. More formats arrive with the layout module.

hint.png: PNG preserves the current background; transparent stays transparent.
hint.jpg: JPG doesn't support transparency — transparent areas become white.
hint.copy: Paste directly into chat apps or documents.

SpecManager.title: Manage specs
SpecManager.subtitle: Manage your photo specs, paper specs, and layout templates. Built-in entries are read-only — duplicate one to start customising.

list.builtinHint: Built-in specs are read-only — duplicate one to create an editable copy

fields.idHint: Lowercase letters, numbers and dashes — cannot be changed after creation

toast.duplicated: Created copy “{name}” based on the built-in
toast.validationError: The form has invalid fields — please review before saving

delete.title: Delete “{name}”?
delete.body: This will remove the custom entry. Built-in entries are not affected.
delete.withDependentsBody: {count} layout template(s) reference this spec. After deletion they will fall back to the matching built-in (if any) or become invalid.

import.title: Import specs
import.hint: Choose a JSON file exported from Pixfit
import.preview: Will import {photo} photo / {paper} paper / {layout} layout entries (replaces your existing customisations)

errors.unsupported-version: Unsupported version. Pixfit only imports version 1.

layout.comingSoon: The layout-template editor arrives with M6. For now you can import / export / delete existing templates, but creation is disabled.

empty.title: Select an entry on the left to view its details
empty.subtitle: Or click “New” to create your own spec

errors.title: Couldn't extract the subject
errors.network: Network error while downloading the model. Check your connection and retry.
errors.integrity: The model file failed its integrity check. The connection may have been tampered with — please reload and try again.
errors.init: The inference engine failed to start. Your browser may not support a required feature.
errors.inference: Image processing failed. Try a different photo.
errors.unknown: An unknown error occurred. Please reload the page.
